tr.td: Alkaline phosphatase [Enzymatic activity/volume] in Serum or Plasma
Alanine aminotransferase [Enzymatic activity/volume] in Serum or Plasma

Cholesterol in LDL [Mass/volume] in Serum or Plasma by Direct assay
Cholesterol in HDL [Mass/volume] in Serum or Plasma

tr.th: Conclusion and Recommendations based on this report and previous findings known to us

tr.td: The patient shows elevated creatinine, suggesting impaired renal function, and low globulin, which may indicate decreased immune proteins or possible laboratory error (unit discrepancy). Lipid profile reveals high triglycerides and LDL cholesterol, increasing cardiovascular risk. Other parameters, including glucose, electrolytes, liver enzymes, and albumin, are within normal limits. Renal function and lipid abnormalities warrant further clinical evaluation and management.

text.div: Provider Organization: Ospedale Vecchio di Montebelluna
